summary: Tested Photo Auction Bidding Battle feature - all new components (TappingArena, RPSBidding, BattleArena) render correctly and function as expected. Backend APIs pass all tests.
seed_data_creation: Created minted photo 'Test Battle Photo' for test@blendlink.com user to enable testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo Auction Bidding Battle feature fully tested. TappingArena shows countdown, tap area, progress bars, and dollar value updates. RPSBidding shows rock/paper/scissors buttons with real object emojis, bid buttons ($1M-$5M), bankroll display, and auction paddle visualization. BattleArena orchestrates game flow with photo selection phase. All data-testid attributes are present and working.

details: Tap area is clickable and responsive
Dollar value increases with each tap
Rock/Paper/Scissors buttons render with real object emojis
Bid buttons ($1M-$5M) display correctly - NO slider as per spec
Submit button shows selected choice and bid amount
Score display shows win circles for best of 3/5
Photo selection grid displays minted photos
'Auction Bidding Battle (NEW!)' button appears after photo selection
'Find Match' and 'Practice vs Bot' buttons work
Stats display (Wins, Losses, BL Won, Stamina) renders correctly
